mapper.select: with upd_pub as ( update pub set details = details || jsonb_build_object('cover', #{cover}) where id = #{id} returning * ) select p.id, pi.name, pi.type, p.details || jsonb_build_object('@type', pi.type::text) as details, p.pub_date, pi.serial_number from upd_pub p inner join pub_idx pi on p.pub_idx_id = pi.id
